products.name: Aceto Balsamico Tradizionale di Modena DOP
Aceto Balsamico di Modena IGP
pros: Versatile for both savory and sweet dishes

trustedSourceSummary: No official consumer documents were found in the last 60 days, so the latest available official sources from 2025-2026 were used. Organizations used: Altroconsumo. Altroconsumo’s 2025 review highlights the Modena DOP as the most authentic balsamic vinegar and the Modena IGP as the most accessible option, providing clear guidance for consumers.
videoSource: Aceto balsamico: come scegliere quello giusto
